title: V4reverts
body: Reverting two previous commits as one causes an error and one was not published.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.0/OWNERS)~~ [baude,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
UGH, this should not have been merged until we get approval from RHEL.  Please do NOT merge anything into this branch with our first verifying with me.
either way these commits needed to happen.  whether it is 4.0.2 now or something else later.
